recommendations.title: The Three Deaths of Marisela Escobedo
recommendations.overview: After the death of her daughter at the hand of her boyfriend, Marisela Escobedo began to fight for justice not only against the murderer but also against the corrupt Mexican judicial system.

recommendations.title: Bombshell: The Hedy Lamarr Story
recommendations.overview: The life and career of the hailed Hollywood movie star and underappreciated genius inventor, Hedy Lamarr.

recommendations.title: Pamela, A Love Story
recommendations.overview: In her own words, through personal video and diaries, Pamela Anderson shares the story of her rise to fame, rocky romances and infamous sex tape scandal.

recommendations.title: The True Cost
recommendations.overview: Film from Andrew Morgan.  The True Cost is a documentary film exploring the impact of fashion on people and the planet.

recommendations.title: Holy Hell
recommendations.overview: An inside look at a West Hollywood cult formed by a charismatic teacher in the 1980s that eventually imploded.

recommendations.title: Spielberg
recommendations.overview: A documentary on the life and career of one of the most influential film directors of all time, Steven Spielberg.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Baraka
recommendations.overview: A paralysingly beautiful documentary with a global vision—an odyssey through landscape and time—that attempts to capture the essence of life.

recommendations.title: The Devil and Daniel Johnston
recommendations.overview: This 2005 documentary film chronicles the life of Daniel Johnston, a manic-depressive genius singer/songwriter/artist, from childhood up to the present, with an emphasis on his mental illness and how it manifested itself in demonic self-obsession.

recommendations.title: Best Worst Movie
recommendations.overview: A look at the making of the film Troll 2 (1990) and its journey from being crowned the "worst film of all time" to a cherished cult classic.
